violations.description: Food supplies. — --Food item obtained from unapproved source. -Observed package of ground beef in walk in cooler marked not for resale.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Observed open packages of food in freezer in pantry area.--Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Observed boxes of food on floor in pantry area.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Observed untreated wood shelving and trim in food prep area.
Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. -Observed dried food inside microwave.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. -Observed stove in back does not have a vent hood over it.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Observed vent hood over fryer needs to be cleaned.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Observed single service items on floor in pantry area.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Observed there is no hand sink behind bar where food is being prepared.
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
